summary: Iteration 131 - Tested preset analytics, menu-items health, policy-autofix, nearby-pois, vehicle similar/seller fields. Backend APIs all working. Frontend AdminContentBuilder UI elements verified including persona/variant selects, analytics panel, autofix button, and menu health badge.

issues: Console shows HTML hydration warnings: <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option> - minor React hydration issue

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in AdminContentBuilder.js around lines 2041-2065 for select/option elements - caused by dynamic span wrappers inside select elements
seed_data_creation: Created test preset event via /api/admin/site/content-layout/preset-events POST
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints working correctly. AdminContentBuilder has all required UI elements with proper data-testid attributes. Transient timeouts may occur but APIs respond correctly with retry.

/api/admin/site/content-layout/preset-ev.notes: Creates analytics event with preset_id, persona, variant, event_type
Returns preset statistics with apply_count, publish_count, publish_rate

/api/admin/site/content-layout/revisions.notes: Applies auto-fix to draft revision layout

/api/public/geo/nearby-pois GET.notes: Returns nearby POIs from OSM or fallback source

regression_tests.home_page: PASS - Loads correctly with categories and listings
regression_tests.detail_page: PASS - Shows seller info with rating/reviews/response_rate and similar listings
